---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new behavior or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What are you trying to do?

Describe the problem or workflow you're trying to support — not the solution yet.

## Proposed solution

What you think Meridian should do.

## Alternatives you've considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you discarded them.

## Additional context

Screenshots, mockups, references to similar behavior in other apps — anything that helps picture it.
